# <Standard Title>

> **Status:** Draft | Stable | Deprecated

> **Version:** 1.0
>
> **Owner:** <Owner>
>
> **Applies To:** <Repository Area>
>
> This standard defines the rules governing <subject>.
>
> Standards define **what must always remain true**.
> 
> Workflows belong in playbooks.
> 
> Operational procedures belong in runbooks.
> 
> All applicable repository artifacts must comply with this standard.

---

# 1. Purpose

Describe why this standard exists.

Explain:

- What problem it solves.
- Why consistency is important.
- What architectural goal it supports.

---

# 2. Scope

Define where this standard applies.

Explicitly identify:

- Included artifacts
- Excluded artifacts

---

# 3. Principles

List the architectural principles governing this standard.

## Principle 1

Description.

## Principle 2

Description.

---

Additional principles should represent stable architectural rules.

# 4. Requirements

Define the mandatory requirements.

Requirements should:

- Be objective
- Be testable
- Be implementation independent

---

# 5. Compliance

Describe how compliance is determined.

Compliance should be measurable whenever possible.

---

# 6. Exceptions

Describe when exceptions are permitted.

Exceptions should be:

- Rare
- Explicitly justified
- Documented
